metrolink: When using the Metrolink network please ensure you have all your belongings with you at all times. Please check your seat before leaving the service. Unattended items may be removed without warning
headlines: NHS patients can't opt out of Palantir's data platform – but their hospital can

crew_quote: "With all this rain and the temperatures barely breaking a sweat, I reckon we should invest in a good curry just to warm the cockles of our hearts. Let's spice things up!"
